title: ophelon #3785
definition:
1) would that, where one wishes that a thing had happened which
    has not happened or a thing be done which probably will not be done
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) would that, where one wishes that a thing had happened which
    has not happened or a thing be done which probably will not be done

    NASB:  would that (used to express an unattainable wish):
